case_title: SHIGOTO YA INC. VS PERLISS CHERYL DBA MUDPIE INC.

docket_entries.description: CERT MAIL TO CHERYL, PEERLISS, OWNER MUDPIE INC. RETURNED SIGNED.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY PERLISS CHERYL DBA MUDPIE INC. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT SHIGOTO YA INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-11-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,775.00 FILED BY SHIGOTO YA INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PERLISS CHERYL DBA MUDPIE INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-11-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT PERLISS CHERYL DBA MUDPIE INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT SHIGOTO YA INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
